problem id: 81a1d399
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(1)

examples:
  00100110 -> 00010011
  10011110 -> 01001111
  10000111 -> 01000011
  01010011 -> 00101001
  11011001 -> 01101100
  11100000 -> 01110000
  01111101 -> 00111110
  10111011 -> 01011101

query: 01100110
predicted answer: 00110011
